ticket.title: ADD AUTO-SYNC OF NEW USERS TO QUICKBOOKS ON USER CREATION

test_cases.page: Admin Panel - User Creation / QuickBooks Sales - Customers & Leads
test_cases.description: Verify a newly created LakbayHub user automatically appears in QuickBooks without manual intervention.
test_cases.expected_result: The new user automatically appears as a Customer within seconds, with no manual sync action required.
test_cases.actual_result: New user created in LakbayHub admin panel automatically appeared as a Customer in QuickBooks Sales > Customers & Leads within seconds, no manual sync triggered.
test_cases.comments: Auto-sync trigger working as expected on user creation.

test_cases.page: Admin Panel - User Creation / QuickBooks Sales - Customers & Leads
test_cases.description: Verify the synced customer record in QuickBooks accurately reflects the user's name, email, and company as entered in LakbayHub.
test_cases.expected_result: Name, Email, and Company fields match exactly between LakbayHub and QuickBooks with no truncation, mismatches, or formatting issues.
test_cases.actual_result: New user synced to QuickBooks, name, email and company fields match exactly between lakbayhub and quickbooks

test_cases.page: Admin Panel - User Creation / QuickBooks Sales - Customers & Leads
test_cases.description: Confirm the auto-sync completes within an acceptable time window after user creation.
test_cases.expected_result: User appears in QuickBooks within seconds of creation, not requiring a batch/cron cycle to complete.
test_cases.actual_result: New user appeared in QuickBooks Customers & Leads within seconds of creation in LakbayHub, consistent with real-time auto-sync behavior.

test_cases.page: Admin Panel - User Creation / QuickBooks Sales - Customers & Leads
test_cases.description: Verify creating one new user results in exactly one QuickBooks customer record, not multiple.
test_cases.expected_result: Only one matching customer record exists in QuickBooks.
test_cases.actual_result: Only one matching customer record found in QuickBooks for the newly created user; no duplicates observed.
test_cases.comments: No duplicate customer created on auto-sync.

test_cases.page: Admin Panel - User Creation / QuickBooks Sales - Customers & Leads
test_cases.description: Verify behavior when a new user is created with an invalid or missing email address.
test_cases.expected_result: User is either skipped cleanly from sync or the LakbayHub form validation blocks invalid emails at creation, with no sync errors or crashes.
test_cases.actual_result: LakbayHub admin panel blocked user creation with an empty or invalid email format at the form level; user could not be created, so no record was ever sent to QuickBooks for sync.
test_cases.comments: Sync-level error handling isn't actually exercised since invalid/empty emails are rejected by LBH form validation before reaching the sync process. Noted for team awareness, not a defect.

test_cases.page: Admin Panel - User Creation / QuickBooks Sales - Customers & Leads
test_cases.description: Verify behavior when a new user is created using an email that already exists as a QuickBooks customer.
test_cases.expected_result: System does not create a duplicate customer record; existing record is matched/reused or conflict handled per defined business logic.
test_cases.actual_result: Attempting to create a new user with an email already existing as a QuickBooks customer did not create a duplicate; no new customer record was added.
test_cases.comments: Existing customer/email conflict handling working as expected.

test_cases.page: Admin Panel - User Creation / QuickBooks Sales - Customers & Leads
test_cases.description: Verify users with special characters (accented letters, apostrophes, hyphens) in name or company sync correctly without corruption.
test_cases.expected_result: Special characters are preserved accurately in QuickBooks with no encoding errors or truncation.
test_cases.actual_result: New user created with special characters in name/company fields synced to QuickBooks with all characters preserved correctly, no encoding errors or truncation observed.

test_cases.page: Admin Panel - User Creation / QuickBooks Sales - Customers & Leads
test_cases.description: Verify sync integrity holds when multiple users are created in quick succession.
test_cases.expected_result: All users sync individually and accurately - no drops, no merges, no duplicates.
test_cases.actual_result: LakbayHub does not have a bulk/mass user creation function. Users were created one at a time in sequence instead; each synced individually and accurately to QuickBooks with no drops, duplicates, or merges.
test_cases.comments: Bulk creation not applicable - LBH has no such function. Tested via sequential single creations instead.
